title: Boeing Partners with Norsk e-Fuel to Advance SAF Production and Reduce Aviation Emissions
content: Boeing has become a key project development partner of Norsk e-Fuel, supporting one of Europeâ€™s first industrial scale Power-to-Liquids (PtL) facilities. Boeingâ€™s investment will accelerate the production and availability of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) in the Nordics and globally. It is also intended to support the commercial aviation industryâ€™s and ICAO member statesâ€™ common goal to achieve net-zero carbon emissions by 2050.
author: Analysts Account
